finding.suggested_action: Investigate decoupling between structured intent model and AI mindset narrative generation.
finding.title: Stale AI Mindset Guidance Fails to Cohere with Active PUT Intent
finding.summary: Active logical incoherence is observed between intent and AI mindset engines. At tick 328, the structured model presents PREPARE_PUT, yet the Mindset engine fails to generate supporting narrative, with the latest entry stale from 1:35 PM (WAIT), repeating functional decoupling themes from prior builds. Structured risk logic is properly gating execution readiness.
evidence: At tick 328, the state is PREPARE_PUT with readiness (62) suppressed below the threshold (80), enforced by dynamic gaps including 'Current leg agrees'. Transmission data shows mixed short-term movement (spxMove: -1.05, spyMove: -0.04). Mindset data shows only stale WAIT guidance from 1:35 PM, contradicting the active model intent.

Despite favorable supporting factors, the hard blocker 'Market not tradeable' is appropriately applied as the session approaches 4:00 PM, successfully reducing entry readiness to zero and maintaining stable risk management at close.
finding.suggested_action: Maintain current market close risk management settings.
